title: Pain
excerpt:
“Arbre al bosc” – Lluís Ribes i Portillo (cc) “Pain is a natural part of life. Learn to accept it. Learn to take care of it as best you can.   Decrease the complaining. Decrease the self-centeredness around it. Everybody has pain.   Breathe and relax into the pain as best you can.   Please accept natural … 
Llegir més…
